title: Session Capability Matrix
description: Role-based capability matrix defining read/write, tool, transformation, claim, verdict, and gate entitlements for every repo-native role.

default_canonical_state_authority.description: Default for canonical state authority across all roles. Must be false in generic engine.

readable_input_classes.description: Classes of artifacts this role may read, e.g., 'immutable accepted inputs', 'fully materialized dependency artifacts', 'task-local files'.

writable_paths.description: Paths/wildcards this role may write to. Must be scoped to the role's task-owned output directory.

permitted_tools.description: Tools this role is permitted to invoke, e.g., 'filesystem read', 'declared deterministic validators', 'materialize exact human statement'.

permitted_transformations.description: Transformation levels this role may perform. Empty or 'none' for read-only/verification roles.

permitted_claim_classes.description: Classes of claims this role is authorized to assert, e.g., 'role-scoped provisional records', 'verification verdicts within evidence scope'.

forbidden_actions.description: Actions explicitly forbidden for this role.

allowed_verdicts.description: Verdicts this role is authorized to issue.

gate_requirements.description: Required gates before this role may proceed, e.g., 'artifact contract', 'input SHA stability', 'claim boundary'.

canonical_state_authority.description: Whether this role has canonical state promotion authority. Must be false or a condition string.

parallel_artifact_consumption_rules.description: Rules governing consumption of partially-complete artifacts, e.g., 'fully materialized inputs only', 'start and closeout SHA recheck'.
